topIngredients.name: Avobenzone 3%
topIngredients.benefit: Gold standard UVA filter for broad-spectrum coverage

topIngredients.name: Homosalate 15%
topIngredients.benefit: Chemical UVB filter with dry matte finish

topIngredients.name: Helioplex Technology
topIngredients.benefit: Neutrogena's stabilization system keeps UV filters effective longer

verdict: Neutrogena Dry-Touch offers reliable high-SPF protection with a uniquely matte finish ideal for oily skin. Chemical filters are effective but may irritate those with filter sensitivities.
